preamble: The palato-alveolar fricative [ʃ] shifts to the retroflex fricative [ʂ] in the historical development of the Mandarin retroflex series.

examples.note: Phonetic shift as part of the stabilization of the retroflex series.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
